mapper.select: select count(*) from wj_user where user_id = #{user_id}
SELECT auth FROM wj_user_auth WHERE user_idx = #{userIdx}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wj_user (user_name, user_id, user_hash, user_salt, user_email, user_phone, cdate) VALUES (#{user_name}, #{user_id}, #{user_hash}, #{user_salt}, #{user_email}, #{user_phone}, now())
mapper.select: SELECT u.user_idx, u.user_id, u.user_name, u.user_email, u.user_phone, u.cdate, COALESCE(a.auth, 0) as auth FROM wj_user u LEFT JOIN wj_user_auth a ON u.user_idx = a.user_idx ORDER BY u.user_idx DESC
